VBWD — Admin & Storefront Walkthrough

Create a user → grant the Basic access level → buy software on the storefront → inspect the invoice, subscription and package in the admin.

Generated 2026-06-08 · admin :8081 · storefront :8080 · 19 steps, one screenshot each.

Scenario & created records

  • New user: walkthrough.user.99595@example.com (role USER, status Active) — granted access level Basic.
  • Purchased software/plan: GHRM (native price $0.00/yr) on /landing1.
  • Resulting invoice: 078b1ca0… · subscription 4a896994… (ACTIVE) · package/plan 605803af… (GHRM).

Notes: the “Native CMS Pricing” CMS page (/pricing-native) currently renders empty, so the working native plans page /landing1 was used. A $0 plan was bought so the purchase completes without a payment gateway while still producing a real invoice + subscription.

1

Admin login

I open the admin backoffice at http://localhost:8081. It is gated, so it redirects to /admin/login.

http://localhost:8081/admin/login?redirect=/

2

Admin login filled

I enter the administrator credentials (admin@example.com) and submit with Sign In.

http://localhost:8081/admin/login?redirect=/

3

Admin dashboard

Authentication succeeds and the Dashboard loads — KPI cards (MRR, revenue, users…) and the left navigation (Sales, Settings, CMS).

http://localhost:8081/admin/dashboard

4

Users list

From the sidebar I open Users — the user-management list.

http://localhost:8081/admin/users

5

Create user form

I click Create user to open the new-user form (Account + Personal Details).

http://localhost:8081/admin/users/create

6

Create user filled

I fill every field: email, password, status (Active), role (User), first/last name, full billing address (street, city, postal code, country) and phone.

http://localhost:8081/admin/users/create

7

User created

I submit the form. The user is created and I land on the new user's detail page (status Active, role USER).

http://localhost:8081/admin/users/5928710a-ec06-48e3-86d2-4ed3cb0147dd

8

Edit user — access levels

I click Edit User. The Account tab has a User Access Levels section offering the access levels Basic and Pro.

http://localhost:8081/admin/users/5928710a-ec06-48e3-86d2-4ed3cb0147dd/edit

9

Grant Basic permission

I tick Basic — this grants the user the Basic permission set / access level.

http://localhost:8081/admin/users/5928710a-ec06-48e3-86d2-4ed3cb0147dd/edit

10

Basic granted saved

I click Save Changes; the Basic access level is now granted to the user.

http://localhost:8081/admin/users

11

Storefront login as the new user

Switching to the storefront at http://localhost:8080, the newly-created user logs in with their own email + password.

http://localhost:8080/login

12

Native plans — Choose your plan

I open the native pricing page (/landing1, “Choose Your Plan”). It lists the software / plans, each with a price and a Choose Plan button.

http://localhost:8080/landing1

13

Checkout the software

I choose the GHRM software. The checkout opens with the order summary (GHRM, $0.00/year), confirming I'm logged in as the buyer.

http://localhost:8080/checkout?tarif_plan_id=plugin-ghrm

14

Accept terms

I accept the Terms & Conditions; the activation button enables.

http://localhost:8080/checkout?tarif_plan_id=plugin-ghrm

15

Software activated

I click Activate for Free. The purchase completes, an invoice is generated, and the subscription is activated (confirmation page).

http://localhost:8080/checkout/confirmation?invoice_id=078b1ca0-73b9-4f5a-a936-c7c427c838db

16

Admin invoices list

Back in the admin, sidebar → Invoices shows every invoice, newest first — the purchase I just made is at the top.

http://localhost:8081/admin/invoices

17

Invoice detail

I open that invoice. The detail page shows the line items, amounts, billing address and the Subscription info block.

http://localhost:8081/admin/invoices/078b1ca0-73b9-4f5a-a936-c7c427c838db

18

Subscription detail

I open the subscription created by the purchase: user Walk Through, plan GHRM, status ACTIVE, billing period, and the payment history ($0.00 PAID).

http://localhost:8081/admin/subscriptions/4a896994-d4a3-4a7f-91ab-0a2e80e54351

19

Inside the package

Finally I go inside the package — the GHRM plan/package itself: name, price, billing period, features and the assigned access categories.

http://localhost:8081/admin/plans

Each screenshot was captured live via headless Chromium against the running local stack. Self-contained HTML (images embedded).
